content.en:
The Eternal Cloud Liquid is useful for all the Eternal Dao realms, and can alleviate the problems of the Eternal Dao species.

Therefore, many Eternal Dao realms are involved in snatching.

Of course.

Those Eternal Dao Realm who have taken the Eternal Cloud Liquid many times will not participate in the auction, after all, this thing will not help them much, they have developed a drug resistance, and they can no longer use the Eternal Cloud Liquid to alleviate the Eternal Dao Seed problem.

Ye Tian didn't know how to bid anymore, and it was useless for him to ask for this thing.

After a while, the Eternal Cloud Liquid was auctioned away by an Eternal Dao Realm at a high price of 5,200 Nine Pole Points.

Next, there are several resource treasures that will help solve the problem of the Eternal Dao Species, and the grade is getting higher and higher.

After auctioning off more than a dozen of these resources in a row, it was finally a treasure.

"The next auction is the Eternal Dragon Marrow, which is extracted from a natural Dao creature called the Eternal Dragon, which is extremely suitable for improving the cultivation of the Eternal Dao Realm, and is currently auctioned for ten drops, with a starting price of 3,000 Nine Pole Points!" said the auctioneer.

"Eternal Dragon Marrow, it helps to improve the cultivation of the Eternal Dao Realm, the price is so expensive, it must be a good thing, I am worried about improving my cultivation so quickly, I must bid for it!"

Thereupon.

Ye Tian began to participate in the auction.

The ones who really need the Eternal Dragon Marrow are the Eternal Dao Realm that have not been promoted to the peak of the Eternal Dao Realm, and this Eternal Dao Realm has a high probability that it has not even completed the Eternal Dao Body, and its strength is very weak, so there are not many Nine Pole Points.

Of course, there are also a few top Eternal Dao Realms bidding for their juniors, but it is impossible to pay too high a price.

Therefore, Ye Tian was naturally sure to win it at a not too high bidding price.

"3500 Nine Pole Points!"

"4000 Nine Pole Points!"

"4500 Nine Pole Points!"

After some fierce competition, Ye Tian successfully won the ten drops of Eternal Dragon Marrow with 5600 Nine Pole Points.

Afterwards.

Some resources that helped to improve cultivation appeared one after another, and Ye Tian also won it as much as he could, and finally spent more than 30,000 Nine Pole Points to buy several resource treasures.

With these resources, it would definitely be easy for him to raise his cultivation to the late stage of the Eternal Supreme Dao Realm, but if he wanted to ascend to the peak of the Eternal Supreme Dao Realm, I am afraid it would not be enough.

"The next auction is an eternal treasure - the heart is empty. This Eternal Treasure allows two creatures to be locked together, allowing the other to come to the rescue in an instant if one is in danger. Of course, it can also be used as the best life-saving thing for escape. At present, only a few Eternal Primordial Treasures are able to teleport ~. "

Hearing about this special Eternal Primordial Treasure, many Eternal Dao Realms became interested.

Ye Tian was also interested, but the starting price of this Eternal Primordial Treasure was too expensive, full of 19,000 pole points, if he wanted to make a deal, he would definitely not be able to get it without 30,000 or 40,000 pole points.

And it's useless for him to bid now, his wife and children are all staying in the void, unless they wander here in the future, then it will be of some use, but I don't know how many long years will be in the future.

Maybe by then, he would be able to obtain a lot of these eternal treasures.

Therefore, he did not participate in the auction.

In the end, this Eternal Primordial Treasure Heart Empty Lock was auctioned off by an Eternal Dao Realm for 36,000 Ultimate Points.

Soon, there were resources that could accelerate the refining of the Eternal Dao Body, and they were not ordinary resources, otherwise there would be no need to send them to auction.

"The next auction item is the Ten Thousand Dao Golden Grass, which will help the Eternal Dao Body Transformation, and the effect is excellent, not limited to the degree of Eternal Dao Body, even if it reaches the Eternal Dao Body Transformation Ninety Percent, it will still have an effect. The starting price is 15,000 Nine Pole Points, so let's start bidding now!"

As soon as the words fell, many Eternal Dao Realms began to bid.

Ye Tian also hurriedly participated in the auction, this kind of treasure is very rare, and the effect is very fast, which can help him refine and improve the Eternal Dao Body Transformation faster.

So, he had to bid.

Due to the fierce competition, all the way up to 79,000 Extreme Points, there were still several Eternal Dao Realms competing with Ye Tian.

Because this has exceeded their expected price.

In this way, the Wandao Golden Grass was taken down by Ye Tian.

After that, Ye Tian bid for a resource that was even more here than the Ten Thousand Dao Golden Grass, the Nine-Leaf Withered Vine, which could also help refine and improve the Eternal Dao Body, which cost him 100,000 Nine-Pole Points to win.

In this way, Ye Tian has now spent more than 190,000 Nine Pole Points, and the Nine Pole Points on his body are not much.

"I can't just bid on it next, unless it's a treasure that really makes my heart flutter!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Time passed, one auction item after another was auctioned, and every time, Ye Tian couldn't help it, after all, these auction treasures were useful to him, he wanted to bid, but helplessly, there were not enough Nine Pole Points!

At this moment, he felt that he was still poor!

~ The next auction is an Eternal Dao Boundary Stone, using the Eternal Dao Boundary Stone to go to the Eternal Dao Realm, and there is a chance to get the Eternal National Order, with a starting price of 50,000 points. The auctioneer said.

"Eternal Dao Boundary Stone, Eternal State Decree!"

Ye Tian only knew where the Eternal National Order came from, it turned out to be the Eternal Dao Realm.

At this time, there was an Eternal Dao Realm Dao Realm: "The Eternal Dao Boundary Stone is indeed very good, but the chance of obtaining the Eternal National Decree is too small!"

"Hahaha, it's true that the chance of obtaining the Eternal Decree is indeed very small, but the chances of preserving the capital are still very high. "

"Preserve the capital, if it's only the capital, why should I go to the Eternal Dao Realm to take an adventure, it's more dangerous than (Denuo's), only huge benefits are worth the risk!"

While there were many discussions in the Eternal Dao Realm, the auction had already begun.

One after another Eternal Dao Realm participated in the auction, they still wanted to give it a go, what if they got the Eternal Decree?

Even if you don't want to open up the Eternal Realm and sell it to other top Eternal Dao Realms, you can exchange it for a large number of Nine Pole Points and resources!

This time Gan.

Ye Tian also participated in the auction, he still had 170,000 Ninety-Nine Pole Points left, and he still had hope of bidding for the Eternal Dao Boundary Stone.

After a fierce bidding, the auction price soared to 159,000 pole points.

At this time, there were very few eternal realms to bid on.

When Ye Tian reported 179,000 Pole Points, there was no Eternal Dao Realm to continue to quote.

After finalizing it, Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

The Eternal Dao Boundary Stone belongs to him!.
